sample_excerpt: This space has historically been dominated by a dichotomy between the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3090 (Ampere architecture) and the AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX (RDNA 3 architecture).
The 24GB tier (RTX 3090, RTX 4090) remains the gold standard for local LLM practitioners in 2026.

The GeForce RTX 5090 Laptop GPU features a full 24GB of GDDR7 memory.
The 12GB tier, represented by cards like the RTX 3060 12GB and the newer RTX 5060, is the absolute minimum for a "responsive" local LLM experience.
